Video.summary: Witness the human drama of competitor’s desperation for victory and the resulting mechanical carnage.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 11

Video.summary: Follow the exploits of teams all over the country as they battle it out in hopes of becoming champion.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 12

Video.summary: The pace steps up a gear as Philippa investigates behind the scenes of the series’ first Semi-finals.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 13

Video.summary: The second round of semi-finals follows six more teams that have made it through the heats and are one step closer to Grand Final.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 14

Video.summary: Four robotic warriors have battled their way to the Grand Final. The other competitors have been sent to a scrapheap. See what it’s like behind the scenes of the most intense stage of the competition.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 15

Video.summary: Celebrities take to the arena, teaming up with veterans from the series and their robots. The celebrities must control the robots for at least 60 seconds before the professionals can take over.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Video.summary: Initially released on VHS and broadcast on TV a year later, the World Championship featured sixteen robots from eleven different countries. A straight knockout competition would decide which robot would be known as the World Champion.
Video.title: The Third Wars - First World Championship

Image.alt: The Third Wars - First World Championship
The Third Wars - First World Championship
The Third Wars - First World Championship

Video.summary: Four teams take part in the tag team terror tournament. Two teams comprised of two robots enter the arena at once. Only one robot is allowed to battle, only being able to switch with their team-mate by entering their team’s coloured zone.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror

Video.summary: Let the battle for the Third Wars crown commence. With the trials being replaced with all out combat, this series is set to be the most brutal yet.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Teams from across the UK enter the arena in hopes of besting the house robots and making it to the Grand Final. The knockouts keep on coming as eight more competitors think they have what it takes to survive the Robot Wars.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: Eight fresh competitors ready to prove their mettle in the arena. Featuring a special event, Middleweight Melee, a single exhibition battle between five robots weighing under 45.4kg.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: As the knockouts continue to streamline the competition, this week’s special has separate competitors trying to knock-down objects and hit targets to score the most points in Pinball Warriors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: Competitors need to hold their own in this week’s trial, King of the Castle, where they must defend a circle in centre of the arena against the unforgiving house robots. How many will survive to make it to the semi-finals?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: House robot, Shunt goes head-to-head with the competitors. It’s his job to remove the competitors from the ring by any means necessary in this week’s trial, Sumo. Will Shunt do the house robots proud, or will the competitors give him the slip?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: Even more barrels are stacked up, only to be knocked down by a competitor in another Pinball Warrior. After a one-sided fight, a unanimous decision from the judges decides the victor of this week’s heat finals.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: This week’s special event has legs. The Walker Battle special featured robots that do not use wheels or tracks as locomotion battling it out, do they stand a chance against the house robots?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: Half-way through the heats and Pinball Warrior returns to Robot Wars as another robot comes to test their aim and score against the house robots. The arena claims another robot as the knockout competitions march on.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: The last robot football of The Third Wars in this week’s special. A spot in the final isn’t the only thing the heat final can offer one of the competitors this week.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: The sixth Pinball warrior run introduces another competitor to test their skills against the targets, and the house robots. In the knockouts, the house robots are being exploited as the competitors over-crowd the CPZ zones.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: We see more teams from around the UK bringing in their unique, sometimes amusing, sometimes terrifying robots to battle against each other. Sergeant Bash’s flamethrower is put to good use in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: Walker Battle returns as the contestants for this week’s special prepare to put their best foot forward against the other legged robots. A competitor makes the house robots sweat in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat M

Video.summary: Pinball Warrior is back for the eighth time this series and the heats are nearing their end. One of the competitors uses its speed to great effect.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat N

Video.summary: The penultimate Pinball Warrior run is this week. The house robots risk their own metal to attack the competitors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat O

Video.summary: The last heats of The Third Wars, as the finals approach, desperation grows among the competitors to secure a place in the finals. As well as the final heat, this episode features the final Pinball Warrior run of the third series.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat P

Video.summary: Karma comes for one of the competitors as the Semi-Finals commence in spectacular fashion. There are no specials this week as the knockout battles take priority in deciding who will win the crown.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: More heat winners are pitted against each other in knockout competition. The robots attempt to ram, flip and burn their way to the finals, all while trying to avoid the house robots.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: This is what it’s been building up to, The Grand Final is here. Which of the successful semi-finalists will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The Third Wars?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: Northerners compete in an annihilator. In the first round, all six robots would fight each other until one of them was eliminated. The process continued until only two robots remained, with the subsequent winner becoming the annihilator champion.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Northern Annihilator

Video.summary: The South’s turn for the annihilator. Same rules, different robots.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Southern Annihilator
